title: Personal Spaces
description: Individual worlds for each player on a server! No client mods required!
body:
# NOTE: I have decided not to support this mod further, sorry Allows players to create a totally individual world for just them, or the people they invite to join and build in. (Player inviting coming soon.) ### Commands `/myspace enter` To join your Space, or to create it if it doesn't exist
`/myspace exit` To leave your Space if you are already in there and return you to where you were before.
